paper.title_en: Pseudogap and strange metal states in the square-lattice Hubbard model: A comprehensive study
paper.abstract_en: To clarify the origin of the pseudogap and strange metal states as well as their mutual relationship in cuprate superconductors, a comprehensive study on the spectral function, Fermi surface, resistivity and dynamical spin susceptivity of the Hubbard model on the square lattice has been conducted by means of the ladder dual-fermion approximation with an electron self-energy correction. It is found that the appearance of these two states requires that the characteristic hole concentration below which the Mott-Heisenberg and Slater mechanisms of electron localization occurs $p_{\rm MS}$ nearly coincides with the hole concentration where the Van Hove singularity (VHS) point is placed at the vicinity of the Fermi level. When this condition is met the VHS point is pinned at which the nesting condition of the antiferromagnetic (AFM) fluctuation is fulfilled almost everywhere on the Fermi surface in wide range of the hole concentration in a metallic state, i.e., the strange metal state. The spin fluctuation of the strange metal state is nearly quantum critical and the dynamical spin susceptivity is well described by overdamped spin wave having the $ω/T$ scaling with the relaxation rate at the Planckian limit. Because of these distinctive features of the strange metal state, the $k$ dependence of scattering rate of electrons is small and electrons behave as the marginal Fermi liquid, resulting in $T$-linear resistivity. In contrast, the pseudogap state is magnetically in the renormalized classical regime and the pseudogap is formed near the X point where the nesting condition of the short-range AFM order is fulfilled.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文对哈伯德模型中的赝隙和奇异金属态进行了全面研究，涉及量子临界性和边缘费米液体行为，这些与全息凝聚态中的非费米液体和量子临界性相关，尽管没有直接使用全息方法，但其主题与全息凝聚态领域高度交叉，适合收录。
decision.title_zh: 方格哈伯德模型中的赝隙与奇异金属态：一项综合研究
decision.abstract_zh: 为阐明铜氧化物超导体中赝隙与奇异金属态的起源及其相互关系，通过梯子双费米子近似结合电子自能修正，对方格哈伯德模型的谱函数、费米面、电阻率及动态自旋磁化率进行了综合研究。研究发现，这两个态的出现要求特征空穴浓度 p_MS（在此浓度以下发生Mott-Heisenberg和Slater电子局域化机制）与范霍夫奇点（VHS）点位于费米能级附近的空穴浓度几乎重合。当满足此条件时，VHS点被钉扎，使得反铁磁（AFM）涨落的嵌套条件在金属态的空穴浓度宽范围内几乎在整个费米面上得到满足，即奇异金属态。奇异金属态的自旋涨落接近量子临界，动态自旋磁化率由过阻尼自旋波很好地描述，具有 ω/T 标度行为，弛豫率处于普朗克极限。由于奇异金属态的这些显著特征，电子的散射率的k依赖性很小，电子表现为边缘费米液体，导致T线性电阻率。相反，赝隙态在磁性质上处于重整化经典区域，赝隙在X点附近形成，此处短程AFM序的嵌套条件得到满足。
